title: geranium parviflorum var. humile
intro: Geranium parviflorum var. humile, also known as Dwarf Geranium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Geranium parviflorum var. humile include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against pathogens, which can help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
